name: Horn & Hardart Macaroni and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt to taste 2 tablespoons Light cream.
2. Add 1/2 teaspoon White pepper to taste.
3. Add 1 1/2 tablespoons Butter.
4. Chop 1/4 cup Canned tomatoes finely.
5. Stir in 1/2 teaspoon Sugar.
6. Combine the milk and cream in a small saucepan, bring to a simmer over moderate heat.
7. In another saucepan, heat the butter over low heat for 1 minute until foaming.
8. Add the flour and cook, stirring, for 3 minutes.
9. Pour the hot milk into the butter-flour mixture and cook, stirring with a wire whisk or wooden spoon for a few minutes, until thickened.
10. Gradually add the cheese to the white sauce, about 1/4 cup at a time, stirring until melted and smooth.
11. Add the Cayenne pepper, salt, and white pepper to taste.
12. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and sugar into the cheese sauce.
13. Combine the cooked macaroni with the sauce.
14. Transfer to a buttered 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
15. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, until the top is nicely browned.
